data.author: Aditi Bharade
data.title: We tried a fiber-filled Diet Coke that could be sold in the US. It wasn't for everyone, but it won some fans.
data.description: 2026 is the year of fibermaxxing. So we tested Coca-Cola's fiber-enriched Diet Coke, a drink available only in Asia.
data.content:
Coca-Cola introduced a fiber-enriched diet coke in Asia in 2017.Aditi Bharade
  • 2026 is the year of fiber, with big brands gearing up to offer more fiber-rich products.
  • So we tested ou… [+4200 chars]
